User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system.

_id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents a course containing multiple chapters.

_id.description: The unique identifier for the course.

description.description: A brief description of the course.

Chapter.title: Chapter
Chapter.description: Represents a chapter within a course.

_id.description: The unique identifier for the chapter.

courseId.description: The ID of the course this chapter belongs to.

description.description: A brief description of the chapter.

Quiz.title: Quiz
Quiz.description: Represents a quiz within a chapter.

_id.description: The unique identifier for the quiz.

chapterId.description: The ID of the chapter this quiz belongs to.

description.description: A brief description of the quiz.

passingScore.description: The minimum percentage required to pass.

timeLimit.description: The time limit for the quiz in minutes.

isPublished.description: Whether the quiz is published and available to students.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Represents a question within a quiz.

_id.description: The unique identifier for the question.

quizId.description: The ID of the quiz this question belongs to.

codeSnippet.description: Optional code snippet associated with the question.

order.description: The order of the question in the quiz.

QuizResult.title: QuizResult
QuizResult.description: Represents the result of a quiz attempt.

_id.description: The unique identifier for the result.

userId.description: The ID of the user who took the quiz.

quizId.description: The ID of the quiz taken.

totalQuestions.description: The total number of questions in the quiz.

isPassed.description: Whether the user passed the quiz.

timeTaken.description: The time taken to complete the quiz in seconds.
